item: Context collapse and formula drift review
claim_context: platform compression metrics and audience spread audit
governance_note: Medium-priority editorial review recommended. Risk signals are elevated. Review power, omissions, ethical framing, and distortion. Record note: Escalate digital stories where compression, platform metrics, or unintended circulation undermine consent, context, and judgment.
